mapper.select: SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, PRODUCTION_YEAR, PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, PRODUCTION_SIZE, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, FINISH_DATE, PRODUCTION_DETAIL, ARTIST_DETAIL, UNVEILING_STATUS FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} FOR UPDATE
